final:
module binary_counter_3bit (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    input dir,
    output reg [3-1:1-1] count
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 3'b000;
    end else if (en) begin
        if (dir) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end else begin
            count <= count - 1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule
